data.title: outbound-bridge: ticket status transitions not synced to Jira -> closed tickets remain In Progress in Jira
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Local tickets 4fae-8178 (epic, DIG-1417) and 43f1-e23d (task, DIG-1470) are both closed locally but remain 'In Progress' in Jira. The Outbound Bridge is not syncing status transitions for these tickets. DIG-1547 was filed in Jira specifically to report that DIG-1470 is stale.

## Expected Behavior
When a local ticket is transitioned to closed, the Outbound Bridge should update the corresponding Jira issue status to Done/Closed.

## Actual Behavior
Jira issues remain In Progress indefinitely after local closure. This may be caused by:
1. The Outbound Bridge crashes (bugs eccb-3f26 and 277e-d926) preventing the sync run from completing
2. The bridge script only syncing CREATE events but not STATUS transition events
3. The bridge filtering out archived/closed tickets before checking for status updates

## Evidence
- DIG-1417 (Jira: In Progress) vs 4fae-8178 (local: closed)
- DIG-1470 (Jira: In Progress) vs 43f1-e23d (local: closed)
- DIG-1547 filed in Jira to report this exact problem
